entries.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-05-28
entries.summary: Coding agents continue to dominate developer attention, accounting for 4 of the top 5 projects by star velocity. DeepSeek-Reasonix (11,990 stars, +3,100 in 24h) broke out with a 2x acceleration, signaling strong interest in token-cost-optimized terminal agents. Understand-Anything (40,708 stars, +8,528) remains the hottest project overall, sustained for multiple days. The category's average daily delta of 3,795 is nearly 3x the next category. Meanwhile, Hacker News discussions reflect a counter-narrative: 'I'm Tired of Talking to AI' (1,870 votes) suggests growing fatigue with chat interfaces, which may indirectly boost interest in agentic tools that reduce direct interaction. The cross-source signal from 'Anthropic and OpenAI have found product-market fit' (736 votes) aligns with the agent tooling surge.
